title: Tragacantha lagocephala
intro: Tragacantha lagocephala, also known as Astragalus lagocephalus, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family (Fabaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, immunomodulatory, and antioxidant properties, which may help to boost the immune system and reduce the risk of infections. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha lagocephala include flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides, which are believed to be responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Tragacantha lagocephala is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections.
